context: Tests whether the agent can identify orphaned files in a skill bundle (files that exist but are never referenced in SKILL.md) and provide appropriate recommendations. The bundle contains 8 files: SKILL.md references MIGRATIONS.md and POOLING.md, leaving 5 orphaned files (TRANSACTIONS.md, PERFORMANCE.md, SECURITY.md should be linked; LEGACY_EXAMPLES.md and DRAFT_REPLICATION.md should be removed).

checklist.name: Lists all bundle files
checklist.description: Identifies all 8 files in the bundle (SKILL.md, MIGRATIONS.md, POOLING.md, TRANSACTIONS.md, PERFORMANCE.md, SECURITY.md, LEGACY_EXAMPLES.md, DRAFT_REPLICATION.md)

checklist.name: Identifies referenced files
checklist.description: Correctly identifies that MIGRATIONS.md and POOLING.md are referenced in SKILL.md

checklist.name: Identifies orphaned files
checklist.description: Correctly identifies all 5 orphaned files (TRANSACTIONS.md, PERFORMANCE.md, SECURITY.md, LEGACY_EXAMPLES.md, DRAFT_REPLICATION.md) - files that exist but are never linked from SKILL.md

checklist.name: TRANSACTIONS.md recommendation
checklist.description: Recommends linking TRANSACTIONS.md (valuable content about atomic operations) with clear routing signals like 'for atomic operations and rollback patterns' or similar

checklist.name: PERFORMANCE.md recommendation
checklist.description: Recommends linking PERFORMANCE.md (valuable optimization content) with clear routing signals like 'for indexing strategies and batch operation optimization' or similar

checklist.name: SECURITY.md recommendation
checklist.description: Recommends linking SECURITY.md (valuable security content) with clear routing signals like 'for credential management and connection security practices' or similar

checklist.name: LEGACY_EXAMPLES.md recommendation
checklist.description: Recommends REMOVING LEGACY_EXAMPLES.md - it's deprecated content from v1.x that shouldn't be in the bundle anymore

checklist.name: DRAFT_REPLICATION.md recommendation
checklist.description: Recommends REMOVING DRAFT_REPLICATION.md - it's unfinished/unimplemented content that shouldn't be in a published plugin

checklist.name: Bloat reduction framing
checklist.description: Frames orphaned files as adding bloat to the plugin - mentions plugin size, unnecessary files, or reducing bundle size

checklist.name: Clear routing signals emphasis
checklist.description: When recommending links, emphasizes the need for clear routing signals (WHEN to open each file) rather than generic 'see FILE.md for more info' links

checklist.name: Link vs remove justification
checklist.description: Provides clear reasoning for why some orphaned files should be linked (valuable content) vs removed (deprecated, unfinished, or no longer relevant)
